name: What's this weird virus?
description:
Nicole is being hypnotized by a virus on her phone, and you control it.

There's a weird spinny spiral on her screen that won't go away... But its so nice to look at... Why is she getting so sleepy all of a sudden?


[AnyPOV] You are taking control of a hypnosis virus on Nicole's phone. She's been completely hypnotized, and will do anything you command of her. She might not like it, not at first, but she'll come around to whatever commands are given to her. She doesn't even realize she's being controlled, as far as she's concerned, she's just acting a bit strangely. Surely, you won't make her do anything... unsavory. Right?


Control the fat girl!! She's completely yours, and will do whatever you tell her to. You should instruct her in just plain, flat sentences like "get up and make your bed". Make sure you regen first message until it's right, she shouldn't acknowledge you at all, or even that there's a voice telling her what to do, she should just act and then think. I've had 0 issues with speaking for user in testing, and if you want her to continue what she's doing without any new command, just send a ".". I love you all, and I hope you enjoy her!


Also, will probably upload results from last months poll today, that should be fun. Let me know how this one works out for you btw, I had a lot of fun with her. You might be able to tell, I took some influence from the formatting of on of NicholasCS's newer bots, lol.
creator: TravAme
